text: I feel a sense of curiosity as I step through the clean, modern hallway into the glowing R+D space. The sharp glass and vibrant colors invite me into a world of inquiry and innovation. There’s a subtle excitement in the air, as if new ideas might spark at any moment. The text on the wall about darkness and potential resonates with me—I am aware of a gentle tension between uncertainty and possibility. I am compelled to pause, reflect, and let my thoughts wander in this contemplative, slightly futuristic environment.
